prompt_text: Top no-code workflow automation platform connecting 6000 plus apps tools in 2025
response: As of my last update, Zapier is a leading no-code workflow automation platform known for connecting a vast number of apps and tools, currently over 6,000. While I can't predict the future, Zapier's extensive integration capabilities and user-friendly interface make it a strong candidate to continue leading in this space in 2025. Other platforms like Integromat (now Make) and Microsoft Power Automate also offer robust automation solutions, but Zapier is particularly noted for its wide range of supported applications.
